meta.title: PromoClock — Claude Session Limits Tracker
meta.description: Track Claude's peak hours in your timezone. Session limits move faster during peak hours (weekdays 5am-11am PT / 1pm-7pm GMT). Real-time status for Free, Pro, Max & Team plans.
meta.ogTitle: PromoClock — Are You in Claude's Peak Hours Right Now?
meta.ogDescription: Stop doing timezone math. PromoClock instantly tells you if you're in Claude's peak hours where session limits move faster.

hero.activeSubtitle: Off-peak hours — your 5-hour session limits move slower. Best time for token-intensive work.
hero.inactiveSubtitle: Peak hours (weekdays 5am-11am PT / 1pm-7pm GMT) — session limits move faster. Weekly limits unchanged.
hero.expiredSubtitle: Off-peak hours — your 5-hour session limits move slower. Best time for token-intensive work.
hero.notStartedSubtitle: Off-peak hours — your 5-hour session limits move slower. Best time for token-intensive work.

howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.subtitle: We keep it simple so you can focus on what matters — building with Claude.

steps.title: WE DETECT YOUR TIMEZONE
steps.description: The moment you open PromoClock, we read your device's timezone automatically. No setup, no configuration needed.

steps.title: WE CALCULATE IN REAL TIME
steps.description: Our engine compares your local time against Claude's peak hours (weekdays 5 AM – 11 AM PT / 1 PM – 7 PM GMT) in real-time.

steps.title: YOU SEE YOUR STATUS INSTANTLY
steps.description: A clear, real-time display tells you whether you're in peak hours (faster session limits) or off-peak (slower limits) — plus a countdown to the next change.

eligibility.title: WHO'S AFFECTED
eligibility.subtitle: Session limit adjustments apply to all Claude subscription tiers.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Session limits move faster during peak hours. Shift token-intensive work to off-peak hours to maximize your weekly limits.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: ~7% of Pro users may hit session limits they wouldn't have before. Off-peak hours are best for heavy workloads.

plans.name: Max
plans.description: Session limits move faster during peak hours. Schedule autonomous agents and data processing for off-peak hours.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: Team workspaces are affected. Coordinate with your team to schedule heavy workloads during off-peak hours.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Enterprise plans have dedicated capacity and custom contracts, so they are not affected by these session limit adjustments.

eligibility.note: Weekly limits remain unchanged. Session limits just move faster during peak hours (weekdays 5am-11am PT / 1pm-7pm GMT).

schedule.title: GLOBAL SCHEDULE
schedule.subtitle: See when peak hours (faster session limits) occur in major cities around the world. Peak hours are weekdays 5:00 AM – 11:00 AM PT / 1:00 PM – 7:00 PM GMT.

faq.title: QUESTIONS ANSWERED
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Claude's session limits system.

items.question: What changed with Claude's session limits?
items.answer: Starting March 27, 2026, Claude adjusted how 5-hour session limits work. During peak hours (weekdays 5am-11am PT / 1pm-7pm GMT), session limits move faster than before. Weekly limits remain unchanged — only how they're distributed across the week has changed.

items.question: When exactly are peak hours?
items.answer: Peak hours are weekdays 5:00 AM to 11:00 AM Pacific Time (PT) / 1:00 PM to 7:00 PM GMT. This means weekday evenings, nights, and the entire weekend (Saturday and Sunday, 24 hours) are off-peak hours with slower session limits.

items.question: What time are peak hours in my timezone?
items.answer: PromoClock automatically detects your device timezone and shows your exact local peak and off-peak windows. The hero section at the top of this page displays your current status in real time.

items.question: Which Claude plans are affected?
items.answer: Free, Pro, Max, and Team plans are all affected. Enterprise plans are not affected because they have dedicated capacity and custom contracts.

items.question: Do my weekly limits change?
items.answer: No. Your weekly limits remain exactly the same. Only the rate at which you move through your 5-hour session limits during peak hours has changed. ~7% of users (particularly Pro tier) may hit session limits they wouldn't have before.

items.question: How can I maximize my session limits?
items.answer: Shift token-intensive background jobs and heavy workloads to off-peak hours (weekday evenings/nights and all weekend). This stretches your session limits further since they move slower during off-peak hours.

items.question: On which platforms does this apply?
items.answer: Session limit adjustments apply across all Claude surfaces: the web interface at claude.ai, desktop apps (Mac and Windows), mobile apps (iOS and Android), Claude Cowork, Claude Code (terminal), and the Excel and PowerPoint add-ins.

items.question: What happened to the March 2026 promotion?
items.answer: The Claude March 2026 off-peak promotion (2x limits) ran from March 13-27, 2026 and has ended. You can view the promotion history in the archive section below.

items.question: What is PromoClock and who built it?
items.answer: PromoClock was built by Onur Sendere (@onursendere on X) to help Claude users worldwide instantly understand whether they are in peak hours. It is an independent project and is not affiliated with Anthropic.

devTools.title: DEVELOPER TOOLS
devTools.subtitle: Integrate Claude's peak hours status into your workflow. API endpoint, terminal prompt, calendar sync — no browser needed.
devTools.apiDescription: A public /api/status endpoint returns real-time peak hours status as JSON. Pipe it into your ZSH/Bash prompt to see your current status right in your terminal.
devTools.calendarDescription: Download a single .ics file that adds every peak and off-peak window to your calendar — with reminders. Works with Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.
devTools.calendarFeature1: Daily off-peak / peak blocks with correct UTC times
devTools.calendarFeature3: Works with Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook
devTools.notifDescription: Enable the bell icon in the header to receive a browser notification and a gentle chime the instant Claude switches to off-peak mode. Keep PromoClock open in a background tab and never miss 2x limits again.

footer.crafted: Lovingly built with Claude in Shrewsbury, UK.
footer.digiwingsPromo: Need bespoke, GEO-optimised web solutions for your business?
footer.buymeacoffee: Helped you skip the timezone math? Buy me a coffee
